creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just noticed the rc script uses 

 # REQUIRE: sshd

instead of

 # REQUIRE: LOGIN

I'll post an updated diff in the morning when I'm on a real laptop. I
did find the perl code that holds the version for the status output, but
haven't discovered why it's upset about it. It's buried in NfSenRC.pm.
